function.name: bookAppointment
function.description: Confirm and book the appointment after the caller has selected a slot from the availability results. Generates a confirmation number and logs the booking.

phone.description: Guest's phone number, digits only, including area code

service.description: Full service string with all add-ons, e.g. '60-min Relaxation Massage + Hot Stone + CBD Enhancement (lavender)'

slot_description.description: Human-readable description of the chosen slot, e.g. 'Wednesday, May 28 at 2:00 PM with Alex'

notes.description: Pressure preference, health concerns, therapist notes, membership status, first-time guest info
